nodes.label: requireLocalSupabaseUrl() fail-closed guard
nodes.rationale: Enforces local-only test/bootstrap boundary so a misconfigured env var cannot mutate a hosted Supabase project.

nodes.label: Failure-atomic fixture rollback (AggregateError)
nodes.rationale: Tracks every created Auth ID and rolls back in reverse order on failure so partial RED runs don't leave orphaned fixtures requiring a db reset.

nodes.label: Critical finding: unenforced local-only test boundary
nodes.norm_label: critical finding: unenforced local-only test boundary

nodes.label: Important finding: login-capable seed not technically local-only
nodes.norm_label: important finding: login-capable seed not technically local-only

nodes.label: Important finding: fixture setup not failure-atomic
nodes.norm_label: important finding: fixture setup not failure-atomic

nodes.label: Important finding: missing authorization contract tests
nodes.norm_label: important finding: missing authorization contract tests

nodes.label: private.is_active_business_owner(uuid) predicate
nodes.rationale: Restricts every privileged owner/target destination to an active sales|manager profile, closing the Super-Admin-as-owner gap.

nodes.label: Activity Log actor_id = auth.uid() binding
nodes.rationale: Prevents browser callers from forging audit attribution or supplying id/created_at.

nodes.label: Important finding: privileged INSERT allows invalid owner destinations
nodes.norm_label: important finding: privileged insert allows invalid owner destinations

nodes.label: Important finding: Activity Log actor_id forgeable
nodes.norm_label: important finding: activity log actor_id forgeable

nodes.label: Important finding: incomplete four-role operation matrix tests
nodes.norm_label: important finding: incomplete four-role operation matrix tests

nodes.label: Important finding: business-fixture cleanup silently ignores failures
nodes.norm_label: important finding: business-fixture cleanup silently ignores failures

nodes.label: Minor finding: RLS ownership predicates lack supporting indexes
nodes.norm_label: minor finding: rls ownership predicates lack supporting indexes

nodes.label: src/lib/mock/ removal
nodes.rationale: Production data must come only from RLS-scoped Supabase queries; the mock layer was a temporary prototype scaffold.

nodes.label: target_profile_snapshot safe-key allowlist constraint
nodes.rationale: Only name/email/role scalar keys permitted, preventing secret leakage into an immutable audit snapshot.

nodes.label: Important finding: admin event labels omitted from search haystack
nodes.norm_label: important finding: admin event labels omitted from search haystack

nodes.label: Minor finding: authenticated-column privilege lacks direct regression test
nodes.norm_label: minor finding: authenticated-column privilege lacks direct regression test

nodes.label: manage-team-member Edge Function
nodes.rationale: Server-held service-role client is the sole caller of private lifecycle RPCs; browsers never get direct RPC execution.

nodes.label: private.transfer_active_ownership(...) function
nodes.rationale: Locks source/destination/actor in deterministic UUID order to avoid deadlock; transfers scoped business rows atomically while preserving Sales Orders/revenue/targets/Activity Log.

nodes.label: enforce_active_business_owner_invariant.sql migration
nodes.rationale: Trigger-level FOR SHARE lock serializes owner insert/reassignment against concurrent role/status demotion to close a TOCTOU race.

nodes.label: Important finding: 16KiB limit enforced only after full buffering
nodes.norm_label: important finding: 16kib limit enforced only after full buffering

nodes.label: Important finding: DB-first reactivation allows old-JWT access on unban failure
nodes.norm_label: important finding: db-first reactivation allows old-jwt access on unban failure

nodes.label: Important finding: owner eligibility is policy-only, races role-change
nodes.norm_label: important finding: owner eligibility is policy-only, races role-change

nodes.label: public.admin_count_active_commercial_items RPC
nodes.rationale: Fix Wave 3: switched from security invoker/service_role-only to security definer with internal role gate so browser (authenticated) callers can reach it via PostgREST.

nodes.label: Bounded per-profile paginated commercial count (Fix Wave 2)
nodes.norm_label: bounded per-profile paginated commercial count (fix wave 2)

nodes.label: Important finding: ownership counts truncated at 1000-row Data API limit
nodes.norm_label: important finding: ownership counts truncated at 1000-row data api limit

nodes.label: Important finding: roster query failure rendered as empty roster
nodes.norm_label: important finding: roster query failure rendered as empty roster

nodes.label: Important finding: JS trim()/case predicate does not match SQL lower(btrim())
nodes.norm_label: important finding: js trim()/case predicate does not match sql lower(btrim())

nodes.label: Important finding: offset pagination can skip/double-count rows
nodes.norm_label: important finding: offset pagination can skip/double-count rows

nodes.label: Critical finding: RPC unreachable from browser (service_role-only grant)
nodes.rationale: Unit tests mocked supabase.rpc() so the real 404 PGRST202 defect was invisible until live browser testing.
nodes.norm_label: critical finding: rpc unreachable from browser (service_role-only grant)

nodes.label: Role union widened to include super_admin (brief)
nodes.norm_label: role union widened to include super_admin (brief)

nodes.label: Super Admin excluded from owner/target/performance collections
nodes.norm_label: super admin excluded from owner/target/performance collections

nodes.label: src/lib/auth/account-status.ts
nodes.rationale: Discriminated active|inactive|missing_profile result with injectable client, avoiding Bun mock.module() cross-file test pollution.

nodes.label: listSalesTeamProfiles() (.eq role sales filter)
nodes.rationale: The single enforcement point keeping Super Admin out of every owner/target/performance selector.

nodes.label: Bun mock.module() cross-file test isolation issue
nodes.rationale: mock.module replaces a module specifier cache entry process-wide, breaking other alphabetically-later test files that import the real client; fixed via optional injectable client parameter instead.
nodes.norm_label: bun mock.module() cross-file test isolation issue

nodes.label: Lovable Git History Safety
nodes.rationale: Published history must not be rewritten because pushed commits synchronize into Lovable and history loss or editor desynchronization may result.

nodes.label: Rationale: Avoid Salesforce cloning; DSM is a purpose-built industrial sales system for existing clients

nodes.label: Three core business flows: RFQ/New Product, Existing/Repeat Order, Prototype
nodes.norm_label: three core business flows: rfq/new product, existing/repeat order, prototype

nodes.label: Rationale: First Super Admin bootstrapped manually with idempotent UUID-targeted promotion

nodes.label: Rationale: Normalize commercial documents into header+items for unique numbering and revisions
nodes.norm_label: rationale: normalize commercial documents into header+items for unique numbering and revisions

nodes.label: Rationale: Reject browser-side max+1 numbering in favor of PostgreSQL atomic allocation

nodes.label: Document header + line items normalization for commercial documents
nodes.norm_label: document header + line items normalization for commercial documents

nodes.label: Rationale: Model Super Admin as an explicit database role, not Manager plus a flag
nodes.norm_label: rationale: model super admin as an explicit database role, not manager plus a flag

nodes.label: Rationale: Deactivation is the default account-removal action to preserve history
nodes.norm_label: rationale: deactivation is the default account-removal action to preserve history

nodes.label: Rationale: Inactive profile fails closed at RLS boundary to prevent stale-token access
nodes.norm_label: rationale: inactive profile fails closed at rls boundary to prevent stale-token access

nodes.norm_label: four-role authorization model (sales, manager, executive, super_admin)

nodes.label: Rationale: One form submission creates one header and all items atomically in PostgreSQL
nodes.norm_label: rationale: one form submission creates one header and all items atomically in postgresql

nodes.label: Rationale: Revenue equals paid line-item totals for the form Date; SO number is administrative
nodes.norm_label: rationale: revenue equals paid line-item totals for the form date; so number is administrative

nodes.label: Rationale: Only the latest Quotation revision enters forecast to prevent double-counting
nodes.norm_label: rationale: only the latest quotation revision enters forecast to prevent double-counting

nodes.label: Rationale: HARIFF backdate SO number does not change the revenue period or consume a counter
nodes.norm_label: rationale: hariff backdate so number does not change the revenue period or consume a counter

nodes.norm_label: seven exact weighted pipeline forecast stages (15%-100%)

nodes.norm_label: rationale: activity log is append-only for every role, including super admin
